name: Turtle Real Brown-Sugar Caramel
description: The real, glossy caramel for the top — brown sugar cooked with a little butter and thinned with almond milk, salted. Genuine caramelized-sugar flavor and drizzle (you can't caramelize Splenda), kept deliberately small: ~121 cal for the whole cake, the one honest-sugar indulgence. Sub-recipe (1 batch).

steps.instructionText: Melt the butter in a small saucepan, add the brown sugar and salt, and cook over medium, stirring, until it bubbles and darkens slightly (~2-3 min). Off heat, whisk in the almond milk (it will sputter) until smooth. Cool slightly — it thickens as it sits; rewarm to drizzle.
